summary: Composite ECG quality classifier output used as a reusable gating signal.
dejargonized_summary: Summarize whether a signal window looks clean enough for downstream analysis by combining two detector streams and the waveform itself.

heuristic.dejargonized_meaning: A window varies enough in quality that one fixed conditioning path may be brittle.

provenance_notes: Composite ECG SQI label derived from the waveform and two detector streams.
In ECG quality scoring this label indicates whether the window is trustworthy enough for downstream analysis.
uncertainty_notes: This output is a heuristic quality indicator, not a ground-truth physiological label.

references.title: BioSPPy ECG SQI implementation
references.citation: Primary upstream implementation for the composite ECG quality classifier.
references.note: Source-backed atom-side metadata for the signal-processing heuristic output.

references.title: Zhao et al. 2018 ECG SQI paper
references.citation: Exact attribution for the ZZ2018 quality classifier family.

uncertainty_notes: Quality labels are heuristics and should be used as gating evidence, not as direct physiological truth.
